title: Who built this code?
description: Contribution concentration and recent activity reveal ownership and maintenance gaps.

basis.title: Analysis basis
basis.description: Review the repository and branch used when calculating ownership concentration.

details.title: Contributor details
details.description: Review the selected ownership signal for {{contributor}}.
details.watchReading: This contributor holds a large share of commits. Review whether knowledge is too concentrated.
details.healthyReading: Ownership is visible here, but the current share does not cross the watch threshold.
details.emptyDescription: Select a contributor row only when you need deeper ownership context.
details.emptyBody: Keep the table as the default view and open details only for the contributor you want to review.

chart.title: Ownership concentration
chart.description: Higher top-contributor share means a stronger knowledge concentration signal.
